title: DEEPCRAFT™ Ready Model for Direction of Arrival (Sound)
description: Detect the direction of an incoming sound based on a 4 microphone array
long_description: The DEEPCRAFT™ Ready Model for Direction of Arrival (Sound) is a production-ready Edge AI model that detects the direction of an incoming sound based on a 4 microphone array and outputs one of the 8 cardinal directions.
